name: Gracestack AI Memory Agent
description: Cognitive memory system using Ebbinghaus forgetting curves, Hyperdimensional Computing (HDC) for pattern matching, and Gut Feeling anomaly detection for clinical decision support.

skills.name: Patient Memory Recall
skills.description: Retrieve patient history with Ebbinghaus decay-weighted relevance scoring

skills.name: HDC Pattern Detection
skills.description: Detect clinical patterns using Hyperdimensional Computing vector similarity

skills.name: Gut Feeling Anomaly Detection
skills.description: Flag potential clinical anomalies including drug interactions, symptom escalation, and unusual patterns
